title: Ukuma Taʻai
extract:
Ukuma Ta'ai (born 17 January 1987) is a Tongan former professional rugby league footballer who last played as a second-row, loose forward or prop for Newcastle Thunder in the RFL Championship on DR loan in a player-coach role from the York Knights in the Super league, and Tonga at international level.
He previously played for the New Zealand Warriors in the NRL and the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League.
